properties.remark: MULTIPLE REPORTS OF A TORNADO NEAR INTERSTATE 80 BETWEEN MILE POSTS 149 AND 165. TORNADO APPEARS TO HAVE LASTED BETWEEN 1240 AND 1253PM.
